label: Recurrence & feedback state

node.label: Recurrence & feedback state
node.definition: A state is repeatedly updated as inputs arrive, enabling temporal dependence and iterative computation.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Recurrence & feedback state is to connect Sequences, events & time series, Gating & multiplicative control to downstream capabilities including Differentiable memory read/write, Recurrent neural networks, Energy-based, Hopfield & Boltzmann models.
examples: substrate for Energy-based, Hopfield & Boltzmann models
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Sequences, events & time series, Gating & multiplicative control.

dependencies.rationale: Recurrence & feedback state uses Sequences, events & time series as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Recurrence & feedback state is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Gating & multiplicative control.
Recurrence & feedback state uses Dynamical systems & control theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
